title: Advanced Multi-Factor Authentication with Real-Time OTP Validation

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Advanced Multi-Factor Authentication with Real-Time OTP Validation

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g fill='#B7D7CD' transform='translate(50,50)'><circle cx='0' cy='0' r='10'/><circle cx='10' cy='0' r='10'/><circle cx='20' cy='0' r='10'/></g><g fill='#C06C88' transform='translate(150,50)'><rect x='-20' y='-10' width='40' height='20'/><rect x='-10' y='-10' width='40' height='20'/></g><g fill='#411C56' transform='translate(250,50)'><text x='10' y='10'>Authentication</text><text x='10' y='30'>System</text></g><g fill='#B7D7CD'><path d='M0,100L100,100A10,10 0 0,1 90,90A10,10 0 0,1 90,100L0,100'/><path d='M0,150L100,150A10,10 0 0,1 90,140A10,10 0 0,1 90,150L0,150'/></g>
<g fill='#C06C88'><path d='M180,0H220A10,10 0 0,1 220,10V250A10,10 0 0,1 210,250H180'/><path d='M180,50H220A10,10 0 0,1 220,60V300A10,10 0 0,1 210,300H180'/></g>
<g fill='#411C56'><text x='190' y='60'>QRCode</text><text x='190' y='100'>OTP</text></g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use real-time OTP validation API for dynamic updates.
Must generate a dynamic QR code upon user selection.
Must adhere to the specified design and layout precision.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Advanced Multi-Factor Authentication with Real-Time OTP Validation

gradingCriteria.description: Verify real-time OTP validation API integration and dynamic updates.
Evaluate dynamic QR code generation based on user selection.
Assess the visual design and layout precision adherence to the target SVG.
